CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Acute Hospital Care at Home File — Patient File
Version — January 2024
SAS name Label Type Length
BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
FAC_DATA_SUBMSN_DT Facility Data Submission Date DATE 8
CCN CMS Certification Number (Facility Provider Number) CHAR 6
PRVDR_STATE Provider State CHAR 2
FAC_TIER Tier 1: 25+ AHCAH Patients; Tier 2: = 24 AHCAH Patients NUM 1
STATE_BENE_MDCD_ID Encrypted State-Specific Medicaid Beneficiary ID CHAR
